title: anil cylindrica
intro: Anil cylindrica, also known as the cylindrical anil or Mexican gold poppy, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Anil cylindrica include reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be applied topically as a salve or cream for skin issues.
